The neighboring town of Calder, ______ saw restaurant employment fall sharply over the same period—an outcome Nadeem cautions may stem from a factory closure unrelated to the wage change.

choices.text: for instance,
as a result,
by contrast,
in conclusion,

questions.stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
questions.explanation:
The phrase "her favorite section" is a nonrestrictive appositive renaming "The cactus collection." A nonrestrictive element must be set off with a comma before it and a comma after it. Choice B places a comma both before "the desert greenhouse" (which is part of the main subject "The cactus collection ... draws visitors") and after "section," correctly bracketing the appositive. The other choices fail to punctuate both boundaries of the inserted phrase.

【中文】短语"her favorite section"（她最喜欢的区域）是对"The cactus collection"（仙人掌收藏）进行重命名的非限定性同位语。非限定性成分必须前后都用逗号隔开。选项B在"section"之后用逗号，并在"the desert greenhouse"之前已有逗号，正确地把同位语两端都用逗号括起来，而主句仍是"The cactus collection … draws visitors"。其他选项未能把插入短语的两端都正确标点。
questions.passage: Maya volunteers at the city's botanical garden every Saturday morning. She enjoys learning the names of unfamiliar plants, and she has become especially fond of the desert greenhouse. The cactus collection ______ her favorite section, draws visitors from across the region who want to photograph the rare blooms.

choices.text: section the desert greenhouse,
section, the desert greenhouse,
section the desert greenhouse
section: the desert greenhouse

questions.stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
questions.explanation:
Two complete sentences appear here: "The school's robotics team finished building its first competition robot last week" and "the students still need to test how well it can navigate the obstacle course...." Two independent clauses must be separated by terminal punctuation (or another acceptable boundary), not joined with only a comma. Choice C ends the first sentence with a period and begins a new sentence with the transition "However," correctly punctuated. Choice A creates a comma splice, B leaves the boundary unpunctuated, and D fails to end the first independent clause.

【中文】这里有两个完整的句子："The school's robotics team finished building its first competition robot last week" 和 "the students still need to test..."。两个独立分句必须用句末标点（或其他合适的边界）分隔，不能只用逗号连接。选项C用句号结束第一个句子，再用过渡词"However,"开始新句子，标点正确。选项A造成逗号粘连（comma splice），B没有给边界加标点，D没有正确结束第一个独立分句。
questions.passage: The school's robotics team finished building its first competition robot last week. ______ the students still need to test how well it can navigate the obstacle course before the regional tournament begins.

choices.text: Robot,
Robot and
Robot. However,
Robot, however

questions.stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
questions.explanation:
The subject is the singular noun "chef," so it requires a singular present-tense verb. The repeated, habitual action signaled by "Every morning" calls for the simple present tense. "Prepares" is the singular simple-present form that agrees with "chef." Choice A ("prepare") is the plural form, and choices C and D use plural verb forms ("are," "have") that do not agree with the singular subject.

【中文】主语是单数名词"chef"（主厨），因此需要单数的一般现在时动词。"Every morning"（每天早上）表示反复、习惯性的动作，要用一般现在时。"Prepares"是与"chef"一致的单数一般现在时形式。选项A（"prepare"）是复数形式，选项C和D使用了复数动词形式（"are"、"have"），与单数主语不一致。
questions.passage: Every morning before sunrise, the bakery's head chef ______ a batch of dough that will rise slowly throughout the day. By afternoon, the loaves are ready for the front display, where customers line up to buy them while they are still warm.

choices.text: prepare
prepares
are preparing
have prepared

questions.stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
questions.explanation:
The main clause uses the simple past tense ("noticed"), and the change to the coral occurred before that past moment of noticing—"during her absence." The past perfect tense ("had changed") correctly shows an action completed prior to another past action. Choice A (present perfect) and D (future) misplace the action in time, and B ("changes") is singular present, disagreeing with the plural subject "colonies" and with the past time frame.

【中文】主句使用一般过去时（"noticed"），而珊瑚的变化发生在那个过去的"注意到"之前——"during her absence"（在她离开期间）。过去完成时（"had changed"）正确地表示一个动作在另一个过去动作之前完成。选项A（现在完成时）和D（将来时）把动作放错了时间，选项B（"changes"）是单数现在时，既与复数主语"colonies"不一致，也与过去的时间框架不符。
questions.passage: When the marine biologist returned to the reef after the storm, she noticed that several coral colonies ______ during her absence. The bleached patches she photographed would later become important evidence in her study of rising ocean temperatures.

choices.text: have changed
changes
had changed
will change

questions.stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
questions.explanation:
The passage contains two independent clauses: 'Her current project tracks how juvenile cape fur seals adjust their diving patterns as nearby sardine populations shift' and 'she hopes the data will eventually inform regional fishing quotas.' Two independent clauses may be correctly joined by a comma plus a coordinating conjunction (FANBOYS). Choice A uses 'comma + and,' which is correct. Choice B is wrong because a semicolon should not be paired with a coordinating conjunction. Choice C creates a fragment, since 'and' would be left dangling before the second clause without it actually joining. Choice D (no punctuation) produces a run-on / comma-less fusion of two clauses.

【中文】句子包含两个独立分句:'Her current project tracks how juvenile cape fur seals adjust their diving patterns as nearby sardine populations shift' 和 'she hopes the data will eventually inform regional fishing quotas.' 两个独立分句可以用'逗号 + 并列连词(FANBOYS)'正确连接。选项 A 使用'逗号 + and',正确。选项 B 错误,因为分号不应与并列连词搭配使用。选项 C 会造成残缺句,因为后面紧跟 'and' 却没有连词来真正连接第二个分句。选项 D(无标点)会把两个分句粘连成不通顺的连写句。
questions.passage: Marine biologist Renata Okafor spends much of her field season aboard a small research vessel off the coast of Namibia. Her current project tracks how juvenile cape fur seals adjust their diving patterns as nearby sardine populations ______ she hopes the data will eventually inform regional fishing quotas.

choices.text: shift, and
shift; and
shift;
shift

questions.stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
questions.explanation:
Before the blank is the independent clause 'the original cast-iron frame had been engineered to support thin panes of hand-blown glass,' and after it is the independent clause 'modern safety glass is considerably heavier.' Joining two independent clauses requires a comma plus a coordinating conjunction. The relationship is contrast (light historic glass vs. heavy modern glass), so 'but' is the correct conjunction. Choice A ('glass, but') is correct. Choice B lacks the required comma. Choice D uses 'and,' which does not express the contrast and also lacks a comma. Choice C stacks 'and although,' an ungrammatical pairing that turns the second part into a fragment.

【中文】空格前是独立分句 'the original cast-iron frame had been engineered to support thin panes of hand-blown glass',空格后是独立分句 'modern safety glass is considerably heavier.' 连接两个独立分句需要'逗号 + 并列连词'。两者是对比关系(轻的历史玻璃对比重的现代玻璃),所以应使用 'but'。选项 A('glass, but')正确。选项 B 缺少必需的逗号。选项 D 使用 'and',既不能表达对比,也缺少逗号。选项 C 叠用 'and although',语法错误,会把后半部分变成残缺句。
questions.passage: When the city of Lund restored its nineteenth-century botanical conservatory, designers faced an unusual challenge: the original cast-iron frame had been engineered to support thin panes of hand-blown ______ modern safety glass is considerably heavier. To keep the historic silhouette intact, the team reinforced the hidden joints rather than thickening the visible beams.

choices.text: glass, but
glass but
glass, and although
glass and

questions.stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
questions.explanation:
Two issues must be resolved. First, 'lie' (to rest or recline; intransitive) versus 'lay' (to place something; transitive). The letters did not place an object; they rested, so the verb is 'lie,' whose past participle is 'lain'—eliminating 'laid' in B and C. Second, tense: the discovery happened in 2019 (simple past), and the letters' being unread occurred before that point, so the past perfect 'had lain' is needed to mark the earlier-in-the-past action. Choice D ('has lain,' present perfect) wrongly connects the action to the present. Choice A is correct.

【中文】需要解决两个问题。第一,'lie'(躺、处于某状态;不及物)与 'lay'(放置某物;及物)的区别。信件并没有放置某个宾语,而是'静置'在那里,所以应用 'lie',其过去分词是 'lain'——因此排除 B 和 C 中的 'laid'。第二,时态:发现发生在 2019 年(一般过去时),而信件未被阅读的状态发生在那之前,所以需要过去完成时 'had lain' 来标记'过去之前'的动作。选项 D('has lain',现在完成时)错误地把动作与现在相连。选项 A 正确。
questions.passage: In 2019, a team of conservators at the Lisbon archive discovered a bundle of letters that ______ unread for nearly two centuries. Tucked inside a hollowed law book, the correspondence detailed a merchant family's secret financing of early printing presses, a finding that has since reshaped how historians view the spread of literacy in the region.

choices.text: had lain
has laid
had laid
has lain

questions.stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
questions.explanation:
The subject of the verb is the singular pronoun 'Each apprentice,' not the plural noun in the intervening modifier 'working under a different master in a different city.' A singular subject requires a singular verb, so the correct form is 'develops.' Choices A ('develop'), C ('have developed'), and D ('are developing') are all plural-agreeing forms that mismatch the singular subject 'Each apprentice.' The modifying phrase set off by commas is a distractor designed to pull the test-taker toward a plural verb. Choice B is correct.

【中文】动词的主语是单数 'Each apprentice'(每位学徒),而不是插入修饰成分 'working under a different master in a different city' 中的复数名词。单数主语需要单数动词,所以正确形式是 'develops'。选项 A('develop')、C('have developed')和 D('are developing')都是与复数搭配的形式,与单数主语 'Each apprentice' 不一致。由逗号隔开的修饰短语是干扰项,目的是诱导考生选用复数动词。选项 B 正确。
questions.passage: The documentary follows three apprentice luthiers as they learn to carve violin scrolls by hand. Each apprentice, working under a different master in a different city, ______ a distinct technique, yet the film argues that all three approaches descend from a single eighteenth-century workshop.

choices.text: develop
develops
have developed
are developing

questions.stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
questions.explanation:
The sentence after the colon is independent: 'they adjusted their paths week to week...' The transitional word 'Instead' begins this new sentence and must be set off from the main clause by a comma. Choice A ('Instead,') correctly punctuates an introductory transition followed by an independent clause. B omits the necessary comma, creating no boundary between the introductory word and the clause. C ('Instead they') runs the transition directly into the subject with no punctuation, which is incorrect after an introductory adverb. D misuses a semicolon, which cannot follow a single introductory word that is not itself an independent clause.

【中文】冒号后面是一个独立句：'they adjusted their paths week to week...'。过渡词 'Instead' 作为这个新句子的开头，必须用逗号与主句隔开。选项 A（'Instead,'）正确地为引导性过渡词加上逗号，后接独立分句。B 省略了必要的逗号，使引导词与分句之间没有边界。C（'Instead they'）把过渡词直接接到主语上而无标点，引导性副词后这样做是错误的。D 误用分号，分号不能跟在一个本身不是独立句的单一引导词之后。
questions.passage: Marine biologist Dr. Esi Owusu spent eleven seasons documenting the foraging routes of humpback whales off the coast of Newfoundland. Her tagging data revealed something that overturned a long-held assumption: the whales did not follow the krill blooms in a fixed seasonal order. ______ they adjusted their paths week to week, tracking shifts in water temperature that the older models had treated as irrelevant.

choices.text: Instead,
Instead
Instead they
Instead; they

questions.stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
questions.explanation:
The blank joins two independent clauses: 'The fixtures dim automatically when no motion is detected nearby' and 'they brighten the instant a pedestrian or cyclist approaches.' A semicolon correctly links two closely related independent clauses, so C is right. A creates a comma splice. B omits the comma that 'and' would require before a second independent clause (and even with a comma, 'and' would weaken the intended contrast); without that comma it is also a punctuation error. D fuses the two clauses with no punctuation, producing a run-on.

【中文】空格连接两个独立句：'The fixtures dim automatically when no motion is detected nearby' 与 'they brighten the instant a pedestrian or cyclist approaches'。分号可以正确地连接两个关系密切的独立句，所以 C 正确。A 造成逗号粘连（comma splice）。B 在第二个独立句前缺少 'and' 所需的逗号；即便加上逗号，连接独立句的 'and' 前也必须有逗号，缺失即为标点错误。D 两个分句之间完全没有标点，造成流水句（run-on）。
questions.passage: When the city of Lindenmark replaced its century-old streetlamps with adaptive LED fixtures, planners expected to cut energy use by a third. The fixtures dim automatically when no motion is detected nearby ______ they brighten the instant a pedestrian or cyclist approaches. Residents reported that the streets felt both darker overall and, paradoxically, safer at the moments that mattered.

choices.text: detected nearby, they brighten
detected nearby and they brighten
detected nearby; they brighten
detected nearby they brighten

questions.stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
questions.explanation:
The that-clause needs a finite (conjugated) verb: 'the builders ______ how seasonal monsoon flooding would redistribute sediment.' Only 'had anticipated' is a finite verb that can serve as the predicate of the subject 'the builders,' and the past perfect appropriately places their anticipation before the later main-clause action ('they engineered'). B ('anticipating'), C ('having anticipated'), and D ('to have anticipated') are all nonfinite forms (participle, perfect participle, infinitive) that leave the clause without a main verb, producing a sentence fragment within the that-clause.

【中文】that 引导的从句需要一个限定（变位）动词：'the builders ______ how seasonal monsoon flooding would redistribute sediment'。只有 'had anticipated' 是能充当主语 'the builders' 谓语的限定动词，而过去完成时恰当地把他们的'预见'置于后面主句动作（'they engineered'）之前。B（'anticipating'）、C（'having anticipated'）和 D（'to have anticipated'）都是非限定形式（分词、完成分词、不定式），会使从句没有主要动词，从而在 that 从句内造成句子片段。
questions.passage: Archaeologist Priya Nandakumar has argued that the abandoned salt-evaporation ponds of the Rann of Kutch were never the failed industrial sites earlier scholars assumed them to be. Rather, the careful spacing of the embankments suggests that the builders ______ how seasonal monsoon flooding would redistribute sediment, and they engineered the basins to harness rather than resist it.

choices.text: had anticipated
anticipating
having anticipated
to have anticipated

questions.stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
questions.explanation:
The subject of the verb is the plural noun 'the logbooks'; the intervening modifier 'kept by women stationed on remote islands' does not change the number of the subject. A plural subject requires the plural verb 'contain,' so C is correct. A ('contains'), B ('is containing'), and D ('has contained') are all singular forms that fail to agree with the plural subject 'logbooks'—a classic agreement trap created by the long modifying phrase between subject and verb.

【中文】动词的主语是复数名词 'the logbooks'；中间的修饰语 'kept by women stationed on remote islands' 不改变主语的数。复数主语需要复数动词 'contain'，所以 C 正确。A（'contains'）、B（'is containing'）和 D（'has contained'）都是单数形式，无法与复数主语 'logbooks' 保持一致——这是由主语与动词之间的长修饰短语制造的经典主谓一致陷阱。
questions.passage: In her study of nineteenth-century lighthouse keepers, historian Margarethe Volk noticed that the logbooks kept by women stationed on remote islands ______ far more detailed weather observations than those kept by their counterparts on the mainland—a discrepancy she attributes not to diligence but to the keepers' acute dependence on predicting storms.

choices.text: contains
is containing
contain
has contained

questions.stem: If 3(x - 4) = 21, what is the value of x?
questions.explanation:
Divide both sides of 3(x - 4) = 21 by 3 to get x - 4 = 7. Then add 4 to both sides: x = 11.

【中文】将方程 3(x - 4) = 21 两边同时除以 3，得到 x - 4 = 7。然后两边同时加 4，得 x = 11。

questions.stem: A delivery driver earns a base pay of 8 dollars plus 5 dollars for each package delivered. On one trip the driver earned a total of 48 dollars. How many packages did the driver deliver?
questions.explanation:
Let p be the number of packages. Total earnings: 8 + 5p = 48. Subtract 8 from both sides to get 5p = 40, then divide by 5 to get p = 8.

【中文】设包裹数量为 p。总收入为 8 + 5p = 48。两边减 8 得 5p = 40，再除以 5 得 p = 8。

questions.stem: The equation y = 4x + 7 relates the values of x and y. What is the value of y when x = 3?
The equation 2x + 3y = 18 is graphed in the xy-plane. What is the y-coordinate of the point where the line crosses the y-axis?
questions.explanation:
A line crosses the y-axis where x = 0. Substitute x = 0: 2(0) + 3y = 18, so 3y = 18 and y = 6.

【中文】直线与 y 轴相交处 x = 0。代入 x = 0：2(0) + 3y = 18，所以 3y = 18，得 y = 6。

questions.stem: The function f is defined by f(x) = 6x - 5. What is the value of f(4)?

A water tank holds 200 liters of water and is being drained at a constant rate of 15 liters per minute. The function w(t) = 200 - 15t gives the number of liters of water in the tank t minutes after draining begins. How many liters of water are in the tank 4 minutes after draining begins?
The solution to the system of equations below is (x, y). x + y = 12 and x - y = 4. What is the value of x?
questions.explanation:
Add the two equations: (x + y) + (x - y) = 12 + 4, which gives 2x = 16, so x = 8.

【中文】将两个方程相加：(x + y) + (x - y) = 12 + 4，得到 2x = 16，所以 x = 8。

questions.stem: If the ordered pair (x, y) is the solution to the system of equations 2x + y = 11 and y = x + 2, what is the value of y?
questions.explanation:
Substitute y = x + 2 into 2x + y = 11: 2x + (x + 2) = 11, so 3x + 2 = 11, giving 3x = 9 and x = 3. Then y = x + 2 = 3 + 2 = 5.

【中文】将 y = x + 2 代入 2x + y = 11：2x + (x + 2) = 11，所以 3x + 2 = 11，得 3x = 9，x = 3。然后 y = x + 2 = 3 + 2 = 5。

questions.stem: Which of the following is the solution to the inequality 4x > 20?
questions.explanation:
Divide both sides of 4x > 20 by 4. Since 4 is positive, the inequality sign stays the same: x > 5.

【中文】将不等式 4x > 20 两边同时除以 4。由于 4 为正数，不等号方向不变：x > 5。

questions.stem: A student has 30 dollars to spend on notebooks and pens. Each notebook costs 4 dollars and each pen costs 2 dollars. If n represents the number of notebooks and p represents the number of pens, which inequality represents the situation in which the student does not spend more than 30 dollars?
questions.explanation:
Notebooks cost 4 dollars each, so n notebooks cost 4n dollars; pens cost 2 dollars each, so p pens cost 2p dollars. The total spent is 4n + 2p. "Does not spend more than 30 dollars" means the total is at most 30, so 4n + 2p ≤ 30.

【中文】每本笔记本 4 美元，所以 n 本花费 4n 美元；每支笔 2 美元，所以 p 支花费 2p 美元。总花费为 4n + 2p。“不超过 30 美元”表示总花费最多为 30，因此 4n + 2p ≤ 30。

questions.stem: What value of x satisfies the equation 5(x - 3) + 4 = 2x - 11 ?
questions.explanation:
Expand the left side: 5x - 15 + 4 = 5x - 11, so the equation is 5x - 11 = 2x - 11. Subtract 2x from both sides to get 3x - 11 = -11, then add 11 to both sides to get 3x = 0. Dividing by 3 gives x = 0.

【中文】展开左边：5x - 15 + 4 = 5x - 11，所以方程为 5x - 11 = 2x - 11。两边同减 2x 得到 3x - 11 = -11，再两边加 11 得到 3x = 0。除以 3 得 x = 0。

questions.stem:
(3/4)x - 2 = (1/2)x + 5

What is the solution to the equation shown above?
questions.explanation:
Multiply every term by 4 to clear fractions: 3x - 8 = 2x + 20. Subtract 2x from both sides to get x - 8 = 20, then add 8 to both sides to get x = 28.

【中文】每一项同乘 4 以消去分数：3x - 8 = 2x + 20。两边同减 2x 得到 x - 8 = 20，再两边加 8 得到 x = 28。

questions.stem: In the xy-plane, a line passes through the points (2, 5) and (6, 17). What is the y-coordinate of the point where this line crosses the y-axis?
questions.explanation:
The slope is (17 - 5)/(6 - 2) = 12/4 = 3. Using y = 3x + b with the point (2, 5): 5 = 3(2) + b, so 5 = 6 + b and b = -1. The line crosses the y-axis at y = -1.

【中文】斜率为 (17 - 5)/(6 - 2) = 12/4 = 3。用 y = 3x + b 代入点 (2, 5)：5 = 3(2) + b，即 5 = 6 + b，得 b = -1。所以该直线在 y = -1 处与 y 轴相交。

questions.stem: The equation 4x + 3y = 24 represents a line in the xy-plane. What is the x-coordinate of the point where the line crosses the x-axis?
questions.explanation:
A line crosses the x-axis where y = 0. Substituting y = 0 gives 4x + 3(0) = 24, so 4x = 24 and x = 6.

【中文】直线与 x 轴相交处 y = 0。代入 y = 0 得 4x + 3(0) = 24，即 4x = 24，得 x = 6。

questions.stem: A printing service charges a fixed setup fee plus a per-poster cost. The total cost, in dollars, to print x posters is modeled by the function f(x) = 7x + 12. What is the total cost to print 8 posters?
questions.explanation:
Evaluate the function at x = 8: f(8) = 7(8) + 12 = 56 + 12 = 68. The total cost is $68.

【中文】在 x = 8 处求函数值：f(8) = 7(8) + 12 = 56 + 12 = 68。总费用为 68 美元。

questions.stem: A linear function g has a constant rate of change. It is known that g(0) = 20 and g(5) = 45. What is the value of g(12) ?

2x + y = 11
x - y = 1

If (x, y) is the solution to the system of equations shown above, what is the value of x + y ?
questions.explanation:
Add the two equations to eliminate y: (2x + y) + (x - y) = 11 + 1, giving 3x = 12, so x = 4. Substitute into x - y = 1 to get 4 - y = 1, so y = 3. Then x + y = 4 + 3 = 7.

【中文】把两个方程相加以消去 y：(2x + y) + (x - y) = 11 + 1，得 3x = 12，所以 x = 4。代入 x - y = 1 得 4 - y = 1，所以 y = 3。于是 x + y = 4 + 3 = 7。

questions.stem:
3x + 2y = 18
x = 2y - 2

What is the value of x in the solution to the system of equations shown above?
questions.explanation:
Substitute x = 2y - 2 into the first equation: 3(2y - 2) + 2y = 18, which gives 6y - 6 + 2y = 18, so 8y = 24 and y = 3. Then x = 2(3) - 2 = 4.

【中文】把 x = 2y - 2 代入第一个方程：3(2y - 2) + 2y = 18，得 6y - 6 + 2y = 18，所以 8y = 24，y = 3。于是 x = 2(3) - 2 = 4。

questions.stem:
3x - 7 ≤ 11

What is the greatest integer value of x that satisfies the inequality shown above?
questions.explanation:
Add 7 to both sides: 3x ≤ 18. Divide both sides by 3: x ≤ 6. The greatest integer satisfying x ≤ 6 is 6.

【中文】两边加 7：3x ≤ 18。两边除以 3：x ≤ 6。满足 x ≤ 6 的最大整数是 6。

questions.stem: A streaming plan charges a fixed monthly fee of $45 plus $0.20 for each minute of premium content watched. A subscriber wants the total monthly charge to be at most $75. What is the greatest whole number of minutes of premium content the subscriber can watch in a month while meeting this goal?
questions.explanation:
Let m be the number of minutes. The total charge is 45 + 0.20m, and this must be at most 75: 45 + 0.20m ≤ 75. Subtract 45 from both sides to get 0.20m ≤ 30, then divide by 0.20 to get m ≤ 150. The greatest whole number of minutes is 150.

【中文】设 m 为分钟数。总费用为 45 + 0.20m，且不超过 75：45 + 0.20m ≤ 75。两边减 45 得 0.20m ≤ 30，再除以 0.20 得 m ≤ 150。最大的整数分钟数为 150。

questions.stem: A botanist tracks a sapling using the model 5(t − 3) − 2(2t − 7) = 8, where t is the number of weeks since planting. What value of t satisfies the equation?
questions.explanation:
Distribute: 5t − 15 − 4t + 14 = 8. Combine like terms on the left: (5t − 4t) + (−15 + 14) = t − 1. So t − 1 = 8, which gives t = 9.

【中文】展开括号：5t − 15 − 4t + 14 = 8。合并左边同类项：(5t − 4t) + (−15 + 14) = t − 1。于是 t − 1 = 8，解得 t = 9。

questions.stem: In the equation 4(cx − 3) = 6x + 8, c is a constant. For what value of c does the equation have no solution?
questions.explanation:
Expand the left side: 4cx − 12 = 6x + 8. A linear equation has no solution when the variable terms have equal coefficients but the constants differ. Set 4c = 6, giving c = 3/2. The constants are −12 and 8, which are unequal, so there is no solution. Thus c = 3/2.

【中文】展开左边：4cx − 12 = 6x + 8。当变量项系数相等而常数项不等时，一次方程无解。令 4c = 6，得 c = 3/2。此时常数项 −12 与 8 不相等，故无解。所以 c = 3/2。

questions.stem: In the xy-plane, the graph of the equation 2x + ky = 12 passes through the point (−3, 6), where k is a constant. What is the value of k?

A vendor sells two ticket types: child tickets cost $7 each and adult tickets cost $4 each. On one day the vendor collected exactly $100 from these tickets, selling at least one of each type. If x is the number of child tickets and y is the number of adult tickets, both positive integers, how many different ordered pairs (x, y) satisfy 7x + 4y = 100?
questions.explanation:
Solve 7x + 4y = 100 with x, y positive integers. Then 4y = 100 − 7x must be positive and divisible by 4. Since 100 is divisible by 4, 7x must be divisible by 4, so x must be a multiple of 4. Testing x = 4 gives y = 18; x = 8 gives y = 11; x = 12 gives y = 4; x = 16 gives a negative y. So there are 3 valid pairs.

【中文】在 x、y 为正整数的条件下解 7x + 4y = 100。则 4y = 100 − 7x 必须为正且能被 4 整除。由于 100 能被 4 整除，所以 7x 必须能被 4 整除，即 x 必须是 4 的倍数。代入 x = 4 得 y = 18；x = 8 得 y = 11；x = 12 得 y = 4；x = 16 时 y 为负。因此共有 3 组解。

questions.stem: The function f is linear. It is known that f(2) = 11 and f(6) = −1. What is the value of f(0)?
The function f is linear, and for every value of x it satisfies f(x + 4) = f(x) + 10. If f(1) = 7, what is the value of f(9)?
questions.explanation:
Because f is linear with f(x + 4) = f(x) + 10, the output increases by 10 for every increase of 4 in x, so the slope is 10/4 = 2.5. From x = 1 to x = 9 is an increase of 8, which is two steps of 4, adding 2 × 10 = 20. Thus f(9) = f(1) + 20 = 7 + 20 = 27.

【中文】由于 f 为一次函数且 f(x + 4) = f(x) + 10，x 每增加 4，函数值增加 10，所以斜率为 10/4 = 2.5。从 x = 1 到 x = 9 增加了 8，相当于两个 4，函数值增加 2 × 10 = 20。因此 f(9) = f(1) + 20 = 7 + 20 = 27。

questions.stem: The solution to the system of equations 3x + 2y = 19 and 5x − 4y = −5 is (x, y). What is the value of x + y?
questions.explanation:
Multiply the first equation by 2: 6x + 4y = 38. Add this to the second equation 5x − 4y = −5 to eliminate y: 11x = 33, so x = 3. Substitute into 3x + 2y = 19: 9 + 2y = 19, so 2y = 10 and y = 5. Then x + y = 3 + 5 = 8.

【中文】将第一个方程乘以 2：6x + 4y = 38。与第二个方程 5x − 4y = −5 相加以消去 y：11x = 33，所以 x = 3。代入 3x + 2y = 19：9 + 2y = 19，得 2y = 10，y = 5。因此 x + y = 3 + 5 = 8。

questions.stem: In the system of equations ax + 3y = 12 and 4x + 6y = 7, a is a constant. If the system has no solution, what is the value of a?
questions.explanation:
Two linear equations form a system with no solution when the lines are parallel: the coefficients of x and y are proportional, but the constants break that proportion. Match coefficients: a/4 = 3/6 = 1/2, so a = 2. Check the constants: 12/7 does not equal 1/2, so the lines are parallel and distinct, confirming no solution. Thus a = 2.

【中文】当两条直线平行时，二元一次方程组无解：x 与 y 的系数成比例，但常数项不满足该比例。令系数成比例：a/4 = 3/6 = 1/2，所以 a = 2。检验常数：12/7 不等于 1/2，因此两直线平行且不重合，确实无解。所以 a = 2。

questions.stem: A technician is paid $15 for each regular hour and $22 for each overtime hour. In one week she works exactly 40 regular hours plus h overtime hours, and she wants her total weekly pay to be at least $700. What is the least whole number of overtime hours h that meets her goal?
questions.explanation:
Total pay is 15(40) + 22h = 600 + 22h. Require 600 + 22h ≥ 700, so 22h ≥ 100, giving h ≥ 100/22 ≈ 4.55. Since h must be a whole number of hours, the least value is 5.

【中文】总工资为 15(40) + 22h = 600 + 22h。要求 600 + 22h ≥ 700，所以 22h ≥ 100，得 h ≥ 100/22 ≈ 4.55。由于 h 必须是整数小时，最小值为 5。

questions.stem: An integer x satisfies the compound inequality −3 < (2x − 5)/4 ≤ 1. What is the greatest possible value of x?
questions.explanation:
Multiply all three parts by 4: −12 < 2x − 5 ≤ 4. Add 5 throughout: −7 < 2x ≤ 9. Divide by 2: −3.5 < x ≤ 4.5. The greatest integer in this range is 4.

【中文】将三部分同乘 4：−12 < 2x − 5 ≤ 4。各部分加 5：−7 < 2x ≤ 9。同除以 2：−3.5 < x ≤ 4.5。该范围内最大的整数是 4。

questions.stem: Which of the following is equivalent to the expression (3x^2 + 5x) + (2x^2 - 8x)?
questions.explanation:
Combine like terms. The x^2 terms add to 3x^2 + 2x^2 = 5x^2. The x terms add to 5x - 8x = -3x. So the expression is 5x^2 - 3x.

【中文】合并同类项。x^2 项相加为 3x^2 + 2x^2 = 5x^2；x 项相加为 5x - 8x = -3x。因此表达式为 5x^2 - 3x。

questions.stem: The expression x(2x + 7) + 4(2x + 7) is equivalent to 2x^2 + bx + 28, where b is a constant. What is the value of b?
questions.explanation:
Distribute each product: x(2x + 7) = 2x^2 + 7x and 4(2x + 7) = 8x + 28. Add them: 2x^2 + 7x + 8x + 28 = 2x^2 + 15x + 28. Comparing with 2x^2 + bx + 28 gives b = 15.

【中文】分别展开：x(2x + 7) = 2x^2 + 7x，4(2x + 7) = 8x + 28。相加得 2x^2 + 7x + 8x + 28 = 2x^2 + 15x + 28。与 2x^2 + bx + 28 比较，得 b = 15。

questions.stem: If x^2 = 49 and x > 0, what is the value of x?
questions.explanation:
Taking the square root of 49 gives x = 7 or x = -7. Since the equation states x > 0, the value is x = 7.

【中文】对 49 取平方根得 x = 7 或 x = -7。由于题目给出 x > 0，所以 x = 7。

questions.stem: What are the solutions to the equation x^2 - 5x + 6 = 0?
questions.explanation:
Factor the quadratic: x^2 - 5x + 6 = (x - 2)(x - 3). Setting each factor equal to 0 gives x = 2 and x = 3.

【中文】对二次式因式分解：x^2 - 5x + 6 = (x - 2)(x - 3)。令每个因式等于 0，得 x = 2 和 x = 3。

choices.text: x = -2 and x = -3
x = 2 and x = 3
x = 1 and x = 6
x = -1 and x = 6

questions.stem: The function f is defined by f(x) = x^2 + 2. What is the value of f(3)?
questions.explanation:
Substitute x = 3 into the function: f(3) = (3)^2 + 2 = 9 + 2 = 11.

【中文】将 x = 3 代入函数：f(3) = (3)^2 + 2 = 9 + 2 = 11。

questions.stem: The function g is defined by g(x) = 2x^2 - 1. What is the value of g(-2)?
The expression (x^2 - 25)/(x^2 + 9x + 20), where x ≠ -5 and x ≠ -4, is equivalent to which of the following?
questions.explanation:
Factor the numerator as a difference of squares: x^2 - 25 = (x - 5)(x + 5). Factor the denominator: x^2 + 9x + 20 = (x + 5)(x + 4). The common factor (x + 5) cancels, leaving (x - 5)/(x + 4).

【中文】把分子按平方差分解：x^2 - 25 = (x - 5)(x + 5)。把分母分解：x^2 + 9x + 20 = (x + 5)(x + 4)。约去公因式 (x + 5)，得到 (x - 5)/(x + 4)。

questions.stem: Which of the following is equivalent to (3x + 2)(x - 4) - (x^2 - 5x)?
A system of equations is given by y = x^2 - 4x + 7 and y = 2x + 2. If (x1, y1) and (x2, y2) are the two solutions to the system, what is the value of x1 + x2?
questions.explanation:
Set the expressions equal: x^2 - 4x + 7 = 2x + 2, so x^2 - 6x + 5 = 0. By the sum-of-roots relationship, x1 + x2 = -(-6)/1 = 6. (The roots are x = 1 and x = 5, which sum to 6.)

【中文】令两式相等：x^2 - 4x + 7 = 2x + 2，即 x^2 - 6x + 5 = 0。由根与系数关系，x1 + x2 = -(-6)/1 = 6。（两根为 x = 1 和 x = 5，和为 6。）

questions.stem: If x > 0 and 2x^2 - 5x - 12 = 0, what is the value of x?
questions.explanation:
Factor: 2x^2 - 5x - 12 = (2x + 3)(x - 4) = 0. The solutions are x = -3/2 and x = 4. Since x must be positive, x = 4.

【中文】因式分解：2x^2 - 5x - 12 = (2x + 3)(x - 4) = 0。解为 x = -3/2 和 x = 4。由于 x 必须为正，所以 x = 4。

questions.stem: The function f is defined by f(x) = -2(x - 3)^2 + 8. What is the maximum value of f(x)?
questions.explanation:
The function is in vertex form f(x) = a(x - h)^2 + k with a = -2 (negative), so the parabola opens downward and has a maximum at the vertex. The vertex is (3, 8), so the maximum value of f(x) is 8.

【中文】该函数为顶点式 f(x) = a(x - h)^2 + k，其中 a = -2（为负），所以抛物线开口向下，在顶点处取得最大值。顶点为 (3, 8)，因此 f(x) 的最大值为 8。

questions.stem: The function g is defined by g(x) = 4 · 3^x. If g(x) = 324, what is the value of x?
questions.explanation:
Set 4 · 3^x = 324 and divide both sides by 4: 3^x = 81. Since 81 = 3^4, it follows that x = 4.

【中文】令 4 · 3^x = 324，两边除以 4：3^x = 81。因为 81 = 3^4，所以 x = 4。

questions.stem: The expression (6x^2 + 7x - 20)/(2x + 5), where x ≠ -5/2, is equivalent to which of the following?
questions.explanation:
Factor the numerator. We need two binomials whose product is 6x^2 + 7x - 20. Try (2x + 5)(3x - 4) = 6x^2 - 8x + 15x - 20 = 6x^2 + 7x - 20, which matches. So (6x^2 + 7x - 20)/(2x + 5) = [(2x + 5)(3x - 4)]/(2x + 5) = 3x - 4 after canceling the common factor (valid since x ≠ -5/2).

【中文】对分子因式分解。需要找到两个二项式,其乘积为 6x^2 + 7x - 20。尝试 (2x + 5)(3x - 4) = 6x^2 - 8x + 15x - 20 = 6x^2 + 7x - 20,正好相符。因此 (6x^2 + 7x - 20)/(2x + 5) = [(2x + 5)(3x - 4)]/(2x + 5) = 3x - 4(因为 x ≠ -5/2,可以约去公因式 2x + 5)。

questions.stem: For all x where the expressions are defined, a/(x - 3) + b/(x + 2) = (5x - 5)/(x^2 - x - 6), where a and b are constants. What is the value of a?
questions.explanation:
The denominator x^2 - x - 6 factors as (x - 3)(x + 2). Combine the left side over this common denominator: [a(x + 2) + b(x - 3)]/[(x - 3)(x + 2)] = (5x - 5)/[(x - 3)(x + 2)]. So a(x + 2) + b(x - 3) = 5x - 5, i.e., (a + b)x + (2a - 3b) = 5x - 5. Matching coefficients: a + b = 5 and 2a - 3b = -5. Substitute b = 5 - a into the second equation: 2a - 3(5 - a) = -5, so 5a - 15 = -5, giving 5a = 10 and a = 2.

【中文】分母 x^2 - x - 6 可分解为 (x - 3)(x + 2)。把左边通分:[a(x + 2) + b(x - 3)]/[(x - 3)(x + 2)] = (5x - 5)/[(x - 3)(x + 2)]。于是 a(x + 2) + b(x - 3) = 5x - 5,即 (a + b)x + (2a - 3b) = 5x - 5。比较系数:a + b = 5,2a - 3b = -5。把 b = 5 - a 代入第二式:2a - 3(5 - a) = -5,得 5a - 15 = -5,所以 5a = 10,a = 2。

questions.stem: In the xy-plane, the graph of y = x² + bx + 10 intersects the line y = 4x + 6 at exactly one point. What is a possible value of b?
questions.explanation:
Set the expressions equal: x² + bx + 10 = 4x + 6, so x² + (b−4)x + 4 = 0. "Exactly one point" means one real solution, so the discriminant is 0: (b−4)² − 4·1·4 = 0 → (b−4)² = 16 → b − 4 = ±4 → b = 0 or b = 8. Of the choices, 0 works.

【中文】令两式相等：x² + bx + 10 = 4x + 6,即 x² + (b−4)x + 4 = 0。"恰好一个交点"意味着只有一个实数解,故判别式为 0:(b−4)² − 16 = 0 → b = 0 或 8。选项中 0 符合。

questions.stem: In the equation x^2 + kx + 36 = 0, k is a positive constant. If the equation has exactly one real solution, what is the value of k?
questions.explanation:
A quadratic ax^2 + bx + c = 0 has exactly one real solution when its discriminant b^2 - 4ac equals 0. Here a = 1, b = k, c = 36, so k^2 - 4(1)(36) = 0, giving k^2 = 144, so k = 12 or k = -12. Since k is positive, k = 12.

【中文】二次方程 ax^2 + bx + c = 0 恰好有一个实数解,当且仅当判别式 b^2 - 4ac = 0。这里 a = 1,b = k,c = 36,所以 k^2 - 4(1)(36) = 0,得 k^2 = 144,即 k = 12 或 k = -12。由于 k 是正数,所以 k = 12。

questions.stem: The function f is defined by f(x) = 2x^2 - 12x + 23. What is the minimum value of f(x)?
questions.explanation:
Because the leading coefficient (2) is positive, the parabola opens upward and f attains its minimum at the vertex. Complete the square: f(x) = 2(x^2 - 6x) + 23 = 2(x^2 - 6x + 9 - 9) + 23 = 2(x - 3)^2 - 18 + 23 = 2(x - 3)^2 + 5. The squared term is at least 0, so the smallest value of f occurs when x = 3, giving f(3) = 5.

【中文】因为首项系数 2 为正,抛物线开口向上,f 在顶点处取得最小值。配方:f(x) = 2(x^2 - 6x) + 23 = 2(x^2 - 6x + 9 - 9) + 23 = 2(x - 3)^2 - 18 + 23 = 2(x - 3)^2 + 5。平方项不小于 0,所以当 x = 3 时 f 最小,f(3) = 5。

questions.stem: The function g is defined by g(x) = a·b^x, where a and b are positive constants. If g(0) = 3 and g(2) = 48, what is the value of g(3)?
A printer produces 24 pages in 3 minutes at a constant rate. At this rate, how many pages does the printer produce in 7 minutes?
questions.explanation:
The constant rate is 24 pages / 3 minutes = 8 pages per minute. In 7 minutes the printer produces 8 × 7 = 56 pages.

【中文】恒定速率为 24 页 / 3 分钟 = 每分钟 8 页。7 分钟内打印 8 × 7 = 56 页。

questions.stem: A muffin recipe uses flour and sugar in the ratio 5 cups of flour to 2 cups of sugar. If a baker uses 15 cups of flour, how many cups of sugar should be used to keep the same ratio?
questions.explanation:
Using 15 cups of flour is 15 ÷ 5 = 3 times the recipe amount. So sugar must also be tripled: 2 × 3 = 6 cups. (Equivalently, sugar = 15 × 2/5 = 6.)

【中文】使用 15 杯面粉是配方的 15 ÷ 5 = 3 倍，因此糖也要扩大 3 倍：2 × 3 = 6 杯。（即糖 = 15 × 2/5 = 6。）

questions.stem: A jacket originally priced at $80 is on sale for 25% off the original price. What is the sale price of the jacket, in dollars?
questions.explanation:
The discount is 25% of $80 = 0.25 × 80 = $20. The sale price is 80 − 20 = $60. (Equivalently, paying 75% of $80 gives 0.75 × 80 = 60.)

【中文】折扣为 80 美元的 25% = 0.25 × 80 = 20 美元。售价为 80 − 20 = 60 美元。（即支付原价的 75%：0.75 × 80 = 60。）

questions.stem: In a class of 60 students, 18 chose painting as their favorite art activity. What percent of the students chose painting?
questions.explanation:
The fraction who chose painting is 18/60 = 0.30, which equals 30%.

【中文】选择绘画的比例为 18/60 = 0.30，即 30%。

questions.stem: A coach recorded the number of goals scored in 5 games: 4, 7, 7, 9, and 13. What is the mean number of goals scored per game?
questions.explanation:
The mean is the sum divided by the count: (4 + 7 + 7 + 9 + 13) / 5 = 40 / 5 = 8.

【中文】平均数等于总和除以个数：(4 + 7 + 7 + 9 + 13) / 5 = 40 / 5 = 8。

questions.stem: The list below shows the daily high temperatures, in degrees Fahrenheit, recorded over 6 days: 3, 8, 5, 12, 6, 10. What is the median of these temperatures?
questions.explanation:
Order the values: 3, 5, 6, 8, 10, 12. With 6 values, the median is the average of the 3rd and 4th values: (6 + 8) / 2 = 7.

【中文】将数据排序：3, 5, 6, 8, 10, 12。共 6 个数，中位数为第 3 和第 4 个数的平均：(6 + 8) / 2 = 7。

questions.stem: A bag contains 5 red marbles, 3 blue marbles, and 4 green marbles. If one marble is selected at random from the bag, what is the probability that it is blue?
questions.explanation:
There are 5 + 3 + 4 = 12 marbles total and 3 are blue. The probability is 3/12 = 1/4.

【中文】总共有 5 + 3 + 4 = 12 颗弹珠，其中 3 颗为蓝色。概率为 3/12 = 1/4。

questions.stem: At an animal shelter, 40 of the visitors own a dog. Of those 40 dog owners, 30 also own a cat. If one of these 40 dog owners is selected at random, what is the probability that the person also owns a cat?
questions.explanation:
Among the 40 dog owners, 30 also own a cat. The probability is 30/40 = 3/4.

【中文】在 40 名养狗者中，有 30 名同时养猫。概率为 30/40 = 3/4。

questions.stem: To estimate the average number of hours per week that all students at a large high school spend reading for fun, a researcher surveyed every member of the school's book club. Which of the following is the best reason this sample may NOT give a reliable estimate for all students at the school?
questions.explanation:
Book club members are not a random sample of the whole school; people who join a book club tend to read more than average, so the sample is biased and cannot reliably represent all students.

【中文】读书俱乐部成员不是从全校随机抽取的样本；加入读书俱乐部的人通常比平均阅读更多，因此样本有偏差，不能可靠地代表全校学生。

choices.text: The book club members were not selected at random from all students, so they are likely to read more than a typical student.
The researcher should have surveyed fewer book club members.
Reading time cannot be measured in hours per week.
The high school is too large to survey any group of students.

questions.stem: A town wants to estimate the average commute time of all its adult residents. Which sampling method would allow the results to be most reliably generalized to all adult residents of the town?
questions.explanation:
A random sample drawn from all adult residents gives every resident a chance to be included, which avoids bias and lets the results be generalized to the whole population. The other methods sample only specific subgroups (commuters, social-media users, one company's staff), which biases the estimate.

【中文】从全体成年居民中随机抽取的样本使每位居民都有被选中的机会，可避免偏差，并能将结果推广到整个总体。其他方法只抽取特定子群体（通勤者、社交媒体用户、某一家公司的员工），会使估计产生偏差。

choices.text: Surveying only residents waiting at the train station during morning rush hour.
Surveying a randomly selected sample of adult residents from across the town.
Surveying only residents who responded to a post on the town's social media page.
Surveying only employees of the town's largest company.

questions.stem: A muralist mixes blue and white paint in the ratio 3 to 5 to make a custom shade of sky. To paint a large wall, she needs a total of 60 liters of the mixture. How many liters of blue paint will she use?
questions.explanation:
The ratio 3 to 5 has 3 + 5 = 8 total parts, so blue is 3/8 of the mixture. Blue paint = (3/8)(60) = 22.5 liters.

【中文】比例 3 比 5 共有 3 + 5 = 8 份，所以蓝色占混合物的 3/8。蓝色油漆 = (3/8)(60) = 22.5 升。

choices.text: 18 liters
22.5 liters
36 liters
37.5 liters

questions.stem: At a print shop, 3 identical printers working together produce 2,400 pages in 40 minutes. Working at the same constant rate, how many pages would 5 of these printers produce in 90 minutes?
questions.explanation:
Three printers make 2,400/40 = 60 pages per minute, so one printer makes 60/3 = 20 pages per minute. Five printers make 5 × 20 = 100 pages per minute, and in 90 minutes they make 100 × 90 = 9,000 pages.

【中文】三台打印机每分钟打印 2,400/40 = 60 页，所以一台每分钟打印 60/3 = 20 页。五台每分钟打印 5 × 20 = 100 页，90 分钟共打印 100 × 90 = 9,000 页。

questions.stem: A bookstore sets the price of a notebook at $80. Early in the season the store raises the price by 15%. Later, during a sale, it reduces the new price by 10%. What is the final price of the notebook?
questions.explanation:
A 15% increase multiplies the price by 1.15: 80 × 1.15 = 92. A 10% decrease multiplies by 0.90: 92 × 0.90 = 82.80. The final price is $82.80.

【中文】上涨 15% 即乘以 1.15：80 × 1.15 = 92。再下降 10% 即乘以 0.90：92 × 0.90 = 82.80。最终价格为 82.80 美元。

questions.stem: A community garden club had 480 members last year. This year the membership increased to 600 members. What is the percent increase in the number of members from last year to this year?
questions.explanation:
The increase is 600 − 480 = 120 members. Percent increase = (increase ÷ original) × 100 = (120 ÷ 480) × 100 = 25%.

【中文】增加量为 600 − 480 = 120 名成员。增长百分比 = (增加量 ÷ 原数) × 100 = (120 ÷ 480) × 100 = 25%。

questions.stem: A trainer recorded the number of laps completed by 7 swimmers during a practice: 4, 4, 5, 6, 6, 7, and 8. The swimmer who completed 8 laps later withdrew from the data set. How does removing the value 8 affect the mean of the data set?
questions.explanation:
The original mean is (4+4+5+6+6+7+8)/7 = 40/7 ≈ 5.71. Removing 8 gives (4+4+5+6+6+7)/6 = 32/6 ≈ 5.33. Because 8 is greater than the original mean, removing it lowers the mean.

【中文】原始平均数为 (4+4+5+6+6+7+8)/7 = 40/7 ≈ 5.71。去掉 8 后为 (4+4+5+6+6+7)/6 = 32/6 ≈ 5.33。因为 8 大于原平均数，去掉它会使平均数下降。

choices.text: The mean increases.
The mean decreases.
The mean stays the same.
The effect cannot be determined.

questions.stem: Two science classes each took the same 5-question quiz. Class M had scores of 70, 72, 74, 76, and 78. Class N had scores of 60, 68, 74, 80, and 88. Which statement correctly compares the two data sets?
questions.explanation:
Both classes have a mean of 74. Class N's scores are spread farther from 74 (ranging 60 to 88) than Class M's (ranging 70 to 78), so Class N has the greater standard deviation. Equal means with N more spread out matches choice A.

【中文】两个班的平均分都是 74。N 班的分数离 74 更分散（从 60 到 88），而 M 班较集中（从 70 到 78），所以 N 班的标准差更大。平均数相等且 N 班更分散，符合选项 A。

choices.text: The two classes have equal means, and Class N has the greater standard deviation.
The two classes have equal means, and Class M has the greater standard deviation.
Class N has the greater mean and the greater standard deviation.
Class M has the greater mean and the smaller standard deviation.

questions.stem: A school surveyed 200 students about whether they prefer using the library's mobile app or its website to reserve study rooms. Among the 80 tenth-graders, 45 preferred the app and 35 preferred the website. Among the 120 eleventh-graders, 70 preferred the app and 50 preferred the website. If one eleventh-grader is selected at random, what is the probability that this student preferred the app?
questions.explanation:
The condition restricts to the 120 eleventh-graders. Of these, 70 preferred the app, so the conditional probability is 70/120 = 7/12.

【中文】条件限定在 120 名十一年级学生中。其中 70 人喜欢用 app，所以条件概率为 70/120 = 7/12。

questions.stem: A bag contains 3 red marbles, 5 blue marbles, and 4 green marbles, all the same size. If one marble is drawn at random, what is the probability that it is NOT blue?
questions.explanation:
There are 3 + 5 + 4 = 12 marbles total. The marbles that are not blue are the 3 red and 4 green, which is 3 + 4 = 7. The probability is 7/12.

【中文】共有 3 + 5 + 4 = 12 颗弹珠。不是蓝色的有 3 颗红色和 4 颗绿色，即 3 + 4 = 7 颗。概率为 7/12。

questions.stem: A city wants to estimate how many of its 900 registered bicyclists are satisfied with the new bike lanes. Researchers select 60 of the bicyclists at random and find that 42 of them are satisfied. Based on this sample, which of the following is the best estimate of the total number of all 900 registered bicyclists who are satisfied?
questions.explanation:
In the random sample, the proportion satisfied is 42/60 = 0.70. Applying this proportion to all 900 bicyclists gives 0.70 × 900 = 630.

【中文】在随机样本中，满意的比例为 42/60 = 0.70。将该比例应用于全部 900 名骑行者：0.70 × 900 = 630。

questions.stem: A blogger posted an online poll on her cooking website asking visitors, "Do you bake bread at home?" Of the 500 visitors who chose to respond, 410 answered "yes," and the blogger concluded that most residents of her city bake bread at home. Which of the following is the strongest reason this conclusion may not be valid?
questions.explanation:
Generalizing to all city residents requires a random sample of that population. Self-selected visitors to a cooking website are more likely to bake than the general public, so the sample is biased and the conclusion about all residents is not supported. Sample size (A) is not the core flaw, and (C) and (D) are irrelevant to validity.

【中文】要推广到全市居民，需要对该总体进行随机抽样。主动访问烹饪网站并参与投票的人比普通公众更可能爱烤面包，因此样本有偏差，关于全体居民的结论不成立。样本量（A）不是核心问题，（C）和（D）与结论的有效性无关。

choices.text: The sample of 500 responses is too small to draw any conclusion.
Visitors who chose to respond to a cooking website's poll are not a random sample of city residents.
The poll should have asked about other foods in addition to bread.
The percentage who answered "yes" was not exactly equal to the percentage who answered "no."

questions.stem: A textile workshop applies a plant-based dye to cotton sheeting. The amount of dye used is directly proportional to the area of fabric treated, and 3 liters of dye are required for every 8 square meters of fabric. How many liters of dye are required to treat 52 square meters of the fabric?
questions.explanation:
The dye-to-area ratio is constant at 3 liters per 8 square meters. Set up a proportion: dye = (3/8) x area = (3/8)(52) = 156/8 = 19.5 liters.

【中文】染料与面积成正比，比例为每8平方米用3升。建立比例式：染料 = (3/8) x 面积 = (3/8)(52) = 156/8 = 19.5升。

questions.stem: A laboratory coolant is mixed using water and concentrate in a ratio of 5 to 3 by volume. A technician needs to prepare 6.4 liters of the finished coolant. How many milliliters of concentrate are required? (1 liter = 1000 milliliters.)
questions.explanation:
The ratio 5:3 means concentrate is 3 of every 5+3 = 8 equal parts. Concentrate volume = (3/8)(6.4 L) = 2.4 L. Converting: 2.4 L x 1000 = 2400 milliliters.

【中文】比例5:3表示浓缩液占5+3=8份中的3份。浓缩液体积 = (3/8)(6.4升) = 2.4升。换算：2.4升 x 1000 = 2400毫升。

questions.stem: A retailer marks up the cost of a jacket by 40% to set its list price. During a promotion, the jacket is sold at 25% off the list price. The selling price during the promotion is what percent greater than the retailer's cost?
questions.explanation:
Let the cost be c. The list price is 1.40c. Selling at 25% off gives 0.75 x 1.40c = 1.05c. Since 1.05c is 5% greater than c, the selling price is 5% above cost.

【中文】设成本为c。标价为1.40c。打七五折（减25%）后为0.75 x 1.40c = 1.05c。因为1.05c比c大5%，所以售价比成本高5%。

questions.stem: A theater sells admission tickets at a single fixed pre-tax price per ticket. An 8% sales tax is added to the total. A customer who buys 2 of these tickets pays a total of $270.00 including tax. What is the pre-tax price, in dollars, of one ticket?
questions.explanation:
Let p be the pre-tax price of one ticket. The pre-tax total for 2 tickets is 2p, and adding 8% tax gives 2p x 1.08 = 270. So 2p = 270/1.08 = 250, and p = 125 dollars.

【中文】设每张票税前价格为p。两张票税前共2p，加8%税后为2p x 1.08 = 270。于是2p = 270/1.08 = 250，p = 125美元。

questions.stem: A researcher records the number of volunteer hours logged by each of 7 students in one month: 12, 15, 15, 18, 22, 27, and 40. Which statement correctly compares the mean and the median of this data set?
questions.explanation:
The median is the 4th value of the ordered list: 18. The mean is (12+15+15+18+22+27+40)/7 = 149/7 ≈ 21.3. The mean exceeds the median because the large value 40 pulls the mean upward (right skew), while the median is unaffected.

【中文】中位数是排序后第4个值：18。平均数为(12+15+15+18+22+27+40)/7 = 149/7 ≈ 21.3。平均数大于中位数，因为较大的值40把平均数拉高（右偏），而中位数不受影响。

choices.text: The mean is less than the median.
The mean is equal to the median.
The mean is greater than the median, primarily because of the value 40.
The median cannot be determined without more information.

questions.stem: On a chemistry exam, the 18 students in Section X had a mean score of 72 points, and the 12 students in Section Y had a mean score of 82 points. What was the mean score, in points, of all 30 students combined?
questions.explanation:
Total points for Section X = 18 x 72 = 1296; for Section Y = 12 x 82 = 984. Combined total = 1296 + 984 = 2280 over 30 students. Mean = 2280/30 = 76 points.

【中文】X班总分 = 18 x 72 = 1296；Y班总分 = 12 x 82 = 984。合计 = 1296 + 984 = 2280分，共30名学生。平均分 = 2280/30 = 76分。

questions.stem: A transit study classified 300 commuter trips by mode (bus or train) and whether the trip arrived on time. Of the 120 bus trips, 90 arrived on time and 30 were late. Of the 180 train trips, 102 arrived on time and 78 were late. If one of the on-time trips is selected at random, what is the probability that it was a train trip? Give your answer as a fraction or as a decimal rounded to the nearest hundredth.
questions.explanation:
Total on-time trips = 90 (bus) + 102 (train) = 192. Of these, 102 were train trips. P(train | on time) = 102/192 = 17/32 ≈ 0.53.

【中文】准点行程总数 = 90（公交）+ 102（地铁）= 192。其中102次为地铁。P(地铁 | 准点) = 102/192 = 17/32 ≈ 0.53。

questions.stem: Using the same transit study data (120 bus trips: 90 on time, 30 late; 180 train trips: 102 on time, 78 late, for 300 trips total), one of the late trips is selected at random. What is the probability that it was a bus trip? Give your answer as a fraction or as a decimal rounded to the nearest hundredth.
questions.explanation:
Total late trips = 30 (bus) + 78 (train) = 108. Of these, 30 were bus trips. P(bus | late) = 30/108 = 5/18 ≈ 0.28.

【中文】晚点行程总数 = 30（公交）+ 78（地铁）= 108。其中30次为公交。P(公交 | 晚点) = 30/108 = 5/18 ≈ 0.28。

questions.stem: To estimate the average number of books read last year by all 4,200 members of a city library, an analyst randomly selected 200 members from the library's complete membership list and surveyed them. The mean for the sample was 14 books, with a margin of error of 1.5 books at a 95% confidence level. Which conclusion is best supported by this study?
questions.explanation:
Because the sample was randomly drawn from the library's membership, results generalize to that population only. The interval estimate is 14 ± 1.5, i.e., 12.5 to 15.5 books, so A is correct. B overstates a sample mean as an exact universal value; C generalizes beyond the population sampled; D is false because a larger sample reduces but never eliminates margin of error.

【中文】由于样本是从图书馆会员中随机抽取的，结果只能推广到该会员群体。区间估计为14 ± 1.5，即12.5到15.5本，所以A正确。B把样本均值错误当作精确的普遍值；C推广到了被抽样总体之外；D错误，因为更大的样本只能减小而不能消除误差范围。

choices.text: It is plausible that the mean number of books read by all 4,200 members is between 12.5 and 15.5 books.
Exactly 14 books were read by each of the 4,200 members last year.
The results can be generalized to all adults living in the city, whether or not they are library members.
Surveying 200 more members would guarantee a margin of error of 0 books.

questions.stem: A nutrition researcher observed 500 adults and found that those who reported drinking herbal tea daily tended to have lower average blood pressure than those who did not. Participants chose on their own whether to drink the tea; no one was assigned to a group. Based only on this study, which statement is the most appropriate conclusion?
questions.explanation:
This is an observational study in which participants self-selected into groups rather than being randomly assigned. Such a design can establish an association but cannot rule out confounding variables, so it cannot establish cause and effect in either direction. Thus A and C overreach, and D wrongly generalizes beyond the studied population. B is the appropriate conclusion.

【中文】这是一项观察性研究，参与者自行选择是否饮茶，而非随机分组。这种设计只能显示相关性，无法排除混杂变量，因此不能确立任一方向的因果关系。所以A和C都过度推断，D错误地推广到研究总体之外。B是恰当的结论。

choices.text: Drinking herbal tea daily causes a reduction in blood pressure for adults.
There is an association between daily herbal tea drinking and lower blood pressure, but causation cannot be concluded from this study.
Lower blood pressure causes adults to drink more herbal tea.
The result applies to all adults worldwide because the sample was large.

questions.stem: A rectangular garden plot has a length of 12 meters and a width of 5 meters. What is the area, in square meters, of the garden plot?
questions.explanation:
The area of a rectangle equals length times width. Multiply 12 by 5 to get 60 square meters.

【中文】长方形的面积等于长乘以宽。用 12 乘以 5,得到 60 平方米。

questions.stem: A storage box is shaped like a cube with an edge length of 4 inches. What is the volume, in cubic inches, of the box?
questions.explanation:
The volume of a cube equals the edge length cubed. Compute 4 × 4 × 4 = 64 cubic inches.

【中文】正方体的体积等于棱长的三次方。计算 4 × 4 × 4 = 64 立方英寸。

questions.stem: Two angles are supplementary. One of the angles measures 53 degrees. What is the measure, in degrees, of the other angle?
questions.explanation:
Supplementary angles sum to 180 degrees. Subtract: 180 − 53 = 127 degrees.

【中文】互补(补角)的两个角之和为 180 度。相减:180 − 53 = 127 度。

questions.stem: In a right triangle, one of the acute angles measures 35 degrees. What is the measure, in degrees, of the other acute angle?
questions.explanation:
The three angles of a triangle sum to 180 degrees. With a 90-degree angle and a 35-degree angle, the third angle is 180 − 90 − 35 = 55 degrees.

【中文】三角形的三个内角之和为 180 度。已知一个 90 度角和一个 35 度角,第三个角为 180 − 90 − 35 = 55 度。

questions.stem: A right triangle has two legs with lengths 6 and 8. What is the length of the hypotenuse?
questions.explanation:
By the Pythagorean theorem, the hypotenuse equals the square root of (6² + 8²) = √(36 + 64) = √100 = 10.

【中文】根据勾股定理,斜边等于 √(6² + 8²) = √(36 + 64) = √100 = 10。

questions.stem: In right triangle ABC, the right angle is at C. The side opposite angle A has length 9, and the hypotenuse has length 15. What is the value of sin A?
questions.explanation:
The sine of an angle equals the length of the opposite side divided by the hypotenuse. So sin A = 9/15, which simplifies to 3/5.

【中文】一个角的正弦等于对边长度除以斜边长度。所以 sin A = 9/15,化简为 3/5。

questions.stem: A circle has a radius of 7 centimeters. What is the circumference of the circle, in centimeters?
questions.explanation:
The circumference of a circle equals 2πr. With r = 7, the circumference is 2π(7) = 14π centimeters.

【中文】圆的周长等于 2πr。当 r = 7 时,周长为 2π(7) = 14π 厘米。

choices.text: 7π

questions.stem: A circle has a radius of 3 inches. What is the area of the circle, in square inches?
questions.explanation:
The area of a circle equals πr². With r = 3, the area is π(3)² = 9π square inches.

【中文】圆的面积等于 πr²。当 r = 3 时,面积为 π(3)² = 9π 平方英寸。

choices.text: 3π
6π
9π

questions.stem: A cylindrical water tank has a radius of 5 meters and a height of 14 meters. What is the volume, in cubic meters, of the tank?
questions.explanation:
The volume of a cylinder is V = πr²h. Substituting r = 5 and h = 14 gives V = π(5)²(14) = π(25)(14) = 350π cubic meters.

【中文】圆柱体积公式为 V = πr²h。代入 r = 5、h = 14，得到 V = π(5)²(14) = π(25)(14) = 350π 立方米。

questions.stem: A trapezoid has parallel sides of length 8 centimeters and 14 centimeters, and the perpendicular distance between these parallel sides is 6 centimeters. What is the area, in square centimeters, of the trapezoid?
questions.explanation:
The area of a trapezoid is A = ½(b₁ + b₂)h, where b₁ and b₂ are the parallel sides and h is the height between them. So A = ½(8 + 14)(6) = ½(22)(6) = 66 square centimeters.

【中文】梯形面积公式为 A = ½(b₁ + b₂)h，其中 b₁、b₂ 为两条平行边，h 为两平行边之间的高。所以 A = ½(8 + 14)(6) = ½(22)(6) = 66 平方厘米。

questions.stem: In a triangle, the measures of the three interior angles are in the ratio 2 : 3 : 5. What is the measure, in degrees, of the largest interior angle?
questions.explanation:
The interior angles of a triangle sum to 180°. With ratio parts 2 + 3 + 5 = 10, each part equals 180° ÷ 10 = 18°. The largest angle corresponds to 5 parts: 5 × 18° = 90°.

【中文】三角形内角和为 180°。比例份数为 2 + 3 + 5 = 10，每份 = 180° ÷ 10 = 18°。最大角占 5 份：5 × 18° = 90°。

questions.stem: Two parallel lines are cut by a transversal. One angle has a measure of (3x + 10) degrees, and the corresponding angle has a measure of (5x − 30) degrees. What is the value of x?
questions.explanation:
When two parallel lines are cut by a transversal, corresponding angles are congruent. Set the measures equal: 3x + 10 = 5x − 30. Then 10 + 30 = 5x − 3x, so 40 = 2x, giving x = 20.

【中文】两条平行线被一条横截线所截时，同位角相等。令两角相等：3x + 10 = 5x − 30。则 10 + 30 = 5x − 3x，即 40 = 2x，得 x = 20。

questions.stem: In right triangle PQR, the right angle is at Q. Leg PQ has length 9 and leg QR has length 12. What is the value of sin R, the sine of the angle at vertex R?
questions.explanation:
First find the hypotenuse PR using the Pythagorean theorem: PR = √(9² + 12²) = √(81 + 144) = √225 = 15. The angle at R is opposite side PQ = 9, so sin R = opposite/hypotenuse = 9/15 = 3/5.

【中文】先用勾股定理求斜边 PR：PR = √(9² + 12²) = √(81 + 144) = √225 = 15。角 R 所对的边为 PQ = 9，所以 sin R = 对边/斜边 = 9/15 = 3/5。

questions.stem: For an acute angle measured in degrees, cos(x°) = sin(40°). What is the value of x?
questions.explanation:
For complementary angles, the cosine of an angle equals the sine of its complement: cos(x°) = sin(90° − x°). Setting sin(90° − x°) = sin(40°) gives 90 − x = 40, so x = 50.

【中文】对于互余角，一个角的余弦等于其余角的正弦：cos(x°) = sin(90° − x°)。令 sin(90° − x°) = sin(40°)，得 90 − x = 40，所以 x = 50。

questions.stem: A circle in the xy-plane is defined by the equation x² + y² − 6x + 8y = 0. What is the radius of the circle?
questions.explanation:
Complete the square in x and y. For x: x² − 6x becomes (x − 3)² − 9. For y: y² + 8y becomes (y + 4)² − 16. The equation becomes (x − 3)² + (y + 4)² − 9 − 16 = 0, so (x − 3)² + (y + 4)² = 25. Since r² = 25, the radius is r = 5.

【中文】对 x 和 y 分别配方。对 x：x² − 6x = (x − 3)² − 9。对 y：y² + 8y = (y + 4)² − 16。方程变为 (x − 3)² + (y + 4)² − 9 − 16 = 0，即 (x − 3)² + (y + 4)² = 25。因为 r² = 25，所以半径 r = 5。

questions.stem: In a circle with radius 9, a central angle measures 120 degrees. What is the length of the arc that the central angle intercepts?
questions.explanation:
The arc length is the fraction of the circumference equal to the central angle's fraction of 360°. The full circumference is 2πr = 2π(9) = 18π. The arc is (120/360) of this: (1/3)(18π) = 6π.

【中文】弧长等于周长中与圆心角占 360° 比例相同的那部分。整个周长为 2πr = 2π(9) = 18π。弧占其 120/360：(1/3)(18π) = 6π。

choices.text: 3π
6π
9π

questions.stem: A solid wooden cube has an edge length of 12 centimeters. A sphere of the largest possible size is carved out from the interior of the cube so that the sphere touches all six faces of the cube. In terms of pi, what is the volume, in cubic centimeters, of the wood that remains after the sphere is removed?
questions.explanation:
The largest inscribed sphere has a diameter equal to the cube's edge, 12 cm, so its radius is 6 cm. The cube's volume is 12³ = 1728 cm³. The sphere's volume is (4/3)πr³ = (4/3)π(6³) = (4/3)π(216) = 288π cm³. The remaining wood is the cube minus the sphere: 1728 − 288π cm³.

【中文】内切球的直径等于正方体的棱长 12 厘米，所以半径为 6 厘米。正方体的体积为 12³ = 1728 立方厘米。球的体积为 (4/3)πr³ = (4/3)π(6³) = (4/3)π(216) = 288π 立方厘米。剩余木料的体积为正方体减去球：1728 − 288π 立方厘米。

questions.stem: A right circular cone has a base radius of 9 inches and a height of 16 inches. A right circular cylinder has the same base radius of 9 inches and has a volume equal to the volume of the cone. What is the height, in inches, of the cylinder?
questions.explanation:
The cone's volume is (1/3)π r²h = (1/3)π(9²)(16) = (1/3)π(81)(16). The cylinder's volume is π r²H = π(81)H. Setting them equal: π(81)H = (1/3)π(81)(16). Dividing both sides by π(81) gives H = 16/3 ≈ 5.33 inches.

【中文】圆锥体积为 (1/3)π r²h = (1/3)π(9²)(16) = (1/3)π(81)(16)。圆柱体积为 π r²H = π(81)H。令两者相等：π(81)H = (1/3)π(81)(16)。两边同除以 π(81) 得 H = 16/3 ≈ 5.33 英寸。

questions.stem: In triangle ABC, point D lies on side AB and point E lies on side AC such that segment DE is parallel to side BC. The lengths are AD = 6, DB = 9, and AE = 8. What is the length of segment EC?
questions.explanation:
Because DE is parallel to BC, triangle ADE is similar to triangle ABC, so AD/AB = AE/AC. Here AB = AD + DB = 6 + 9 = 15. Thus 6/15 = 8/AC, giving AC = (8·15)/6 = 20. Then EC = AC − AE = 20 − 8 = 12.

【中文】因为 DE 平行于 BC，所以三角形 ADE 与三角形 ABC 相似，故 AD/AB = AE/AC。这里 AB = AD + DB = 6 + 9 = 15。于是 6/15 = 8/AC，得 AC = (8·15)/6 = 20。因此 EC = AC − AE = 20 − 8 = 12。

questions.stem: In an isosceles triangle, the measure of the vertex angle is 4x degrees, and the measure of each of the two congruent base angles is (x + 15) degrees. What is the value of x?
questions.explanation:
The three interior angles of a triangle sum to 180 degrees. The two base angles are equal, so 4x + (x + 15) + (x + 15) = 180. Combining gives 6x + 30 = 180, so 6x = 150 and x = 25. (Check: vertex = 100°, each base = 40°, total = 180°.)

【中文】三角形三个内角之和为 180 度。两个底角相等，所以 4x + (x + 15) + (x + 15) = 180。合并得 6x + 30 = 180，故 6x = 150，x = 25。（验证：顶角 = 100°，每个底角 = 40°，合计 = 180°。）

questions.stem: In right triangle ABC, the right angle is at vertex B. The leg AB has length 24 and the leg BC has length 10. What is the value of sin(A)?
questions.explanation:
Since the right angle is at B, the hypotenuse is AC. By the Pythagorean theorem, AC = √(24² + 10²) = √(576 + 100) = √676 = 26. The side opposite angle A is BC = 10. So sin(A) = opposite/hypotenuse = BC/AC = 10/26 = 5/13.

【中文】由于直角在 B，斜边为 AC。由勾股定理，AC = √(24² + 10²) = √(576 + 100) = √676 = 26。角 A 的对边为 BC = 10。所以 sin(A) = 对边/斜边 = BC/AC = 10/26 = 5/13。

questions.stem: For an acute angle measure, sin(2x + 10)° = cos(3x − 30)°. What is the value of x?
questions.explanation:
The sine of an angle equals the cosine of its complement, so sin(θ) = cos(90 − θ). Thus the angles must be complementary: (2x + 10) + (3x − 30) = 90. This gives 5x − 20 = 90, so 5x = 110 and x = 22. (Check: 2x+10 = 54° and 3x−30 = 36°, which sum to 90°.)

【中文】一个角的正弦等于其余角的余弦，即 sin(θ) = cos(90 − θ)。因此这两个角必互余：(2x + 10) + (3x − 30) = 90。得 5x − 20 = 90，故 5x = 110，x = 22。（验证：2x+10 = 54°，3x−30 = 36°，两者之和为 90°。）

questions.stem: In the xy-plane, a circle is defined by the equation x² + y² − 6x + 8y − 11 = 0. What is the length of the diameter of this circle?
questions.explanation:
Complete the square for both variables. For x: x² − 6x = (x − 3)² − 9. For y: y² + 8y = (y + 4)² − 16. Substituting: (x − 3)² − 9 + (y + 4)² − 16 − 11 = 0, so (x − 3)² + (y + 4)² = 36. The radius is √36 = 6, so the diameter is 2(6) = 12.

【中文】对两个变量配方。对 x：x² − 6x = (x − 3)² − 9。对 y：y² + 8y = (y + 4)² − 16。代入：(x − 3)² − 9 + (y + 4)² − 16 − 11 = 0，即 (x − 3)² + (y + 4)² = 36。半径为 √36 = 6，所以直径为 2(6) = 12。

questions.stem: In a circle with radius 9, an arc has a length of 4π. What is the measure, in degrees, of the central angle that subtends this arc?
questions.explanation:
Arc length equals the circumference times the fraction of the full circle: arc = (θ/360)·2πr, where θ is the central angle in degrees. So 4π = (θ/360)·2π(9) = (θ/360)·18π. Dividing both sides by π: 4 = 18θ/360 = θ/20. Therefore θ = 80 degrees.

【中文】弧长等于圆周长乘以所占整圆的比例：弧长 = (θ/360)·2πr，其中 θ 为以度为单位的圆心角。所以 4π = (θ/360)·2π(9) = (θ/360)·18π。两边同除以 π：4 = 18θ/360 = θ/20。因此 θ = 80 度。
